info.title: memcore API
info.description: Production-grade long-term memory engine for AI agents. Protected routes require `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` and `X-Organization-ID`. `MEMCORE_AUTH_MODE=dev` accepts `MEMCORE_DEV_API_KEY` for local development without scope checks.

get.summary: List in-process background job definitions and recent process-local runs.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: List persisted background job run history.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Optional RFC3339 lower bound on started_at

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Optional RFC3339 upper bound on started_at

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

post.summary: Apply retention cleanup to persisted background job run history only.

200.description: Background job run history retention summary

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

post.summary: Manually run one registered background job once.

parameters.name: job_kind
parameters.description: Job kind: memory-usage-snapshot, provider-usage-retention, or memory-retention

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Process-local aggregate context cache counters for debugging and operations.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Search memory audit events across the organization. Does not return input_text.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Filter by operation (Add, Update, Delete, NoOp, ForgetUser)

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Inclusive RFC3339 lower bound on created_at

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Exclusive RFC3339 upper bound on created_at

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive keyword search over event fields and user_id (max 200 chars; does not search input_text)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_cursor

403.description: Missing AdminRead, AdminWrite, or AuditRead scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Current organization plan configuration and resolved quota defaults.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

put.summary: Create or update the current organization's plan configuration.

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

delete.summary: Delete the current organization's plan configuration.

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Provider usage events (persistent store) or process-local aggregates (`source=memory`).

parameters.name: capability
parameters.description: Filter by capability: llm, embedding, summarization

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: persistent (default when store configured) or memory

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

post.summary: Apply org-scoped provider usage event retention cleanup. `dry_run` defaults to `true`.

200.description: Provider usage retention dry-run or apply summary

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Organization quota status and configured limits.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Optional user id for per-user memory count

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Organization-level aggregate counts for admin visibility. Does not return memory content.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Dashboard-ready organization usage summary over a UTC time window.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Inclusive RFC3339 lower bound. Must be paired with created_before.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Exclusive RFC3339 upper bound. Must be paired with created_after.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Relative UTC window ending now (default 30, max 90). Ignored when both timestamps are provided.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: List org-scoped memory usage snapshots. Does not expose memory content.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

post.summary: Create an org-scoped memory usage snapshot from current aggregate counts.

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Daily provider usage buckets over a UTC time window. Does not expose prompts or memory content.

parameters.name: capability
parameters.description: Filter by capability: llm, embedding, summarization

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Inclusive RFC3339 lower bound. Must be paired with created_before.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Exclusive RFC3339 upper bound. Must be paired with created_after.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Relative UTC window ending now (default 30, max 90). Ignored when both timestamps are provided.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: List users in the organization with memory aggregates. Does not return memory content.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_cursor

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

get.summary: List API keys for the organization. Does not include raw keys or key hashes.

403.description: Missing AdminRead or AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

post.summary: Create an API key for the organization. Returns the raw key once; it is never returned again in list responses.

200.description: API key created (raw_key shown only in this response)

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

delete.summary: Revoke an API key. Revoked keys can no longer authenticate.

403.description: Missing AdminWrite scope in database auth mode

404.description: API key not found in organization

post.summary: Build a formatted context string from relevant memories.

403.description: Forbidden

post.summary: Extract and store memories from a user message conversation.

403.description: Forbidden
Forbidden

delete.summary: Delete all memories and vectors for a user within the organization.

403.description: Forbidden

get.summary: Export memory facts and optional audit events for a user as JSON. Does not include API keys or event `input_text`.

403.description: Missing required scope in database auth mode

post.summary: Import user memory data from a `memcore.user_export.v1` JSON export. Set `dry_run=true` to validate without writes.

200.description: Import completed or dry-run validation summary

403.description: Missing required scope in database auth mode

get.summary: List memories for a user (forward-only opaque cursor pagination).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive keyword search over content and summary (max 200 chars)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_cursor

403.description: Forbidden

delete.summary: Soft-delete a single memory for a user.

403.description: Forbidden

get.summary: List memory audit events for a user. `input_text` is not exposed. Forward-only opaque cursor pagination.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Inclusive RFC3339 lower bound on created_at

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Exclusive RFC3339 upper bound on created_at

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive keyword search over event fields (max 200 chars; does not search input_text)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous next_cursor

403.description: Forbidden

post.summary: Apply user-scoped retention cleanup for facts and audit events. `dry_run` defaults to `true`.

403.description: Missing required scope in database auth mode

get.summary: Safe build/version metadata (no secrets, no runtime env dump).
Liveness probe.
Prometheus scrape endpoint (path configurable; auth optional).

401.description: Unauthorized when metrics auth is required

get.summary: Readiness probe with configured backend labels.

ApiKeyScopeResponse.description: API-facing scope labels (PascalCase) separate from core snake_case serde.

scope.description: Metrics are aggregate counters for this API process only.

raw_key.description: Raw API key returned only once at creation time.

MemoryEventOperationResponse.description: API-facing operation labels (PascalCase) separate from core snake_case serde.

MemoryTypeResponse.description: API-facing memory type labels (PascalCase) separate from core snake_case serde.

source.description: `persistent` reads stored events; `memory` returns process-local aggregates only.

BearerAuth.description: Bearer API key. In dev mode use MEMCORE_DEV_API_KEY; in database mode use a stored key hash lookup.

tags.name: Metrics
tags.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint (disabled by default; auth required by default)
